title: Crestline
prompt: Instrumental only. A 46-second kinetic electronic focus piece at 118 BPM with a sculpted low kick, restrained hand-percussion details, a single clean bass motif, muted synthetic plucks, and a wide atmospheric pad. Give it a sense of forward terrain and momentum without becoming dance music: clear low-end landmarks, spacious mids, and a brief brightening near the final third. Structure: immediate arrival, stable engine, one crest, elegant release. No vocals, no lo-fi, no acoustic instruments, no jazzy chords, no busy hi-hats, no snare rolls, no EDM risers, no drop, no harsh distortion.
